description_long: This machine gun features a robust, angular body with a dark gray metallic finish and a prominent rectangular receiver. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a series of evenly spaced cooling holes along its length, and a silver muzzle at the tip. A large, boxy, gold-colored ammunition feed is mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity, belt-fed system. The rear of the weapon includes a compact, vertical grip and a short, blocky stock, both appearing to be made of black polymer or metal. The top of the receiver is flat, with no visible optics or advanced sighting systems, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional. The construction suggests durability and reliability, suitable for sustained fire in urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavy, angular machine gun with a long, vented barrel, gold box magazine, and compact rear grip and stock. The design is utilitarian, with a dark metallic finish and robust construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the gold box magazine, and the compact rear grip and stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's muzzle, cooling holes, and the protruding gold magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, magazine, and the blocky receiver with minimal ergonomic features.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the compact grip and stock, with the magazine and barrel extending forward.
attribute_barrel_type: long cylindrical barrel with linear cooling holes
attribute_stock_design: short, blocky fixed stock with minimal ergonomic shaping
